query: Create a guide page for virtual anchors and cursor-following patterns in VFloat, then link the relevant API references.
The `useClick` source changed. Please update the docs, especially the example and default behavior notes, even if that means touching both the API page and a guide.
Review `docs/guide/interactions.md` and `docs/api/use-click.md` for duplicated contract details and rewrite them so the guide teaches workflow while the API page stays canonical.
How does `autoPlacement` decide where to put the floating element? Just explain it here.
Add a new homepage hero section to `docs/.vitepress/theme/components/Home.vue`.
